JI-SoEX Structural Design Suite

// RESULT EXTRACTOR · BROWSER API · POWERED BY JRB-ISTRUCT ENGINEERING

JI-SoEX connects directly to your structural analysis software via a browser API — extracting member forces, reactions, and geometry in real time, then applying full RC design checks per NSCP 2015 / ACI 318-14. No manual data entry. No copy-paste. Your analysis results flow straight into design.

How JI-SoEX Works BROWSER API

JI-SoEX is not a standalone analysis tool — it is a result extraction and design layer that sits on top of your existing structural analysis software. It connects via a local browser API to read your model's geometry, load cases, and computed member forces directly from the analysis engine, then performs full RC member design, P-M interaction checks, and envelope visualization — all without you having to re-enter a single value.

v2.0 · LATEST
JI-SoEX
// JRB-ISTRUCT · STRUCTURAL RESULT EXTRACTOR & DESIGN ENGINE · v2.0

JI-SoEX connects to your structural analysis software via a local browser API — automatically extracting member forces, nodal reactions, geometry, and load combinations. It then runs full RC column, beam, and footing design per ACI 318-14 / NSCP 2015, complete with P-M interaction diagrams, biaxial checks, seismic confinement, and color-coded 3D envelope views. Zero manual input from analysis to design.

Download (.exe) Release Notes User Manual

Key Features

Live Browser API

Connects directly to your analysis software's browser output. Click Extract — member forces, geometry, and load cases are read automatically.

Zero Manual Entry

Analysis results flow directly into the design engine. No copy-paste, no re-entering loads or geometry — the API handles all data transfer.

P-M Interaction Design

Full P-M interaction diagrams for RC columns with demand plotting, biaxial index check, and 51-combo load envelope verification.

Stress Envelope View

Color-coded 3D visualization of axial, shear, and moment envelopes — extracted live from the analysis model to highlight critical members.

Auto Design

Automated reinforcement sizing for columns, beams, and footings using extracted forces — with utilization ratios and PASS/CHECK/FAIL results.

PDF & CSV Export

Generate design report PDFs and export all member forces and design results to CSV — ready for documentation or further analysis.

Installation Guide

01
Download JI-SoEX

Download JI-SoEX.exe above. Fully portable — no installer or dependencies required.

02
Open Your Analysis Model

Run your structural analysis in your existing software and export the model to the local index.html browser output.

03
Connect via API

Launch JI-SoEX.exe and click Connect. The app bridges to the browser engine and reads all model data automatically.

04
Extract & Design

Click Extract to pull member forces, then open Column / Beam / Footing design panels for instant RC code checks and reports.
